root.sql:
SELECT sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no, sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_request_amount, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_type, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control, sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) as memname , FPB_KTM_GET_ATM_CONTACT_NO( sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ) as emer_contract_old , PKA_MEM_EDIT.fp_loan_approve( FPB_KTM_GET_ATM_CONTACT_NO( sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ) ) as loan_emer_balance ,
sc_lon_m_loan_request.entry_id FROM sc_lon_m_contract, sc_lon_m_loan_request, sc_lon_m_rule, sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group WHERE ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) and ( ( sc_lon_m_rule.atm_status = '1' ) AND ( sc_lon_m_contract.rec_rep_status = '1' ) AND ( sc_lon_m_contract.create_loan_status = '1' ) ) /*WHERE*/
